name: codex-pilot
description: Help Codex understand your repo, plan safely, verify changes, and improve the codebase over time.

interface.shortDescription: Guide Codex through better repo work.
interface.longDescription: CodexPilot is an unofficial Codex workflow plugin for agent-ready repositories. It helps Codex inspect repo structure, create missing guidance, use execution plans, improve verification, diagnose repeated failures, and turn implicit engineering knowledge into durable repo artifacts such as docs, tests, scripts, lint rules, schemas, and CI checks.
defaultPrompt: Set up CodexPilot in this repo.
Audit this repo for missing Codex context.
Turn repeated Codex failures into repo rules.
